steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the height of Tikal Temple IV. Locate that pyramid in the table and read the value in the Height column.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 70 meters: the value shown in Tikal Temple IV's row. ✓
  • Choice B: height of a different pyramid in the table. ✗
  • Choice C: height of a different pyramid in the table. ✗
  • Choice D: height of a different pyramid in the table. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
